zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde d'Eu於1170年出生在法國時，她的父親John d'Eu Count of Eu52歲，母親Alice Albini33歲。她和Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1212年在法國諾門迪享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde d'Eu于1170年出生在法国时，她的父亲John d'Eu Count of Eu52岁，母亲Alice Albini33岁。她和Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1212年在法国諾門迪享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Eu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

variants.name: De
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Day
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English day(e), dey(e) ‘dairyman or dairymaid’. Originally used only of women, it was later used of men with the sense ‘man in charge of the dairy cattle’. This is probably the most common source of the surname.

English: from the Middle English personal name Day(e) or Dey. In western England this is probably a pet form of David , but in northern England and perhaps elsewhere also it is a late Middle English variant of Daw, a pet form of Ralph (see Daw , Dakin ).
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Deaghaidh (see O'Dea ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde d'Eu was born in 1170, in France, her father, John d'Eu Count of Eu, was 52 and her mother, Alice Albini, was 33. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. She died in 1212, in Normandy, France, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde d'Eu est née en 1170, à France, son père, John d'Eu Count of Eu, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Alice Albini, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. Elle est décédée en 1212, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde d'Eu 1170 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John d'Eu Count of Eu 52 und ihre Mutter Alice Albini 33. Sie hatte mit Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1212 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde d'Eu è nata il nel 1170 nel Francia, sua padre, John d'Eu Count of Eu, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Alice Albini, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. Morì nel 1212, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde d'Euが1170年にフランスで生まれた時，父John d'Eu Count of Euは52歳，母Alice Albiniは33歳であった。彼女はHenry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmontとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1212年にフランスノーマンディで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde d'Eu(이)가 1170년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John d'Eu Count of Eu(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Albini(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1212년 프랑스 노먼디에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde d'Eu nasceu em 1170, em França, seu pai, John d'Eu Count of Eu, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Alice Albini, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. Ela faleceu em 1212, em Normandie, França, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde d'Eu родилась в 1170 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени John d'Eu Count of Eu было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Albini, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. Она умерла в 1212 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde d'Eu nació en 1170, en Francia, su papá, John d'Eu Count of Eu, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Alice Albini, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Henry I d'Estouteville - Lord of Elkington, Sgr d’Estouteville et Rames et de Valmont. Murió en 1212, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años.
